slides.title:
4 Pods. 5 Hours.
*4 Working Apps.*
slides.subtitle: What happens when you give builders a problem, Claude Code, and a deadline.
slides.badge: StellarPH x KMC - Cebu IT Park

cards.title: TindaCheck
cards.description: Grocery price comparison app with barcode scanner. Scan a product, compare unit prices across sizes and packs.

cards.title: Sakay Na!
cards.description: Cebu jeepney route finder. Pick your origin and destination, get the right jeepney route.

cards.title: FitAlarm
cards.description: GPS fitness alarm you can't snooze. Won't stop until you actually go for a run.

cards.title: GiftMaster
cards.description: Relationship intelligence PWA. Remembers birthdays, preferences, and suggests gifts.

slides.title: What *5 hours* produced
slides.subtitle: Every pod shipped something that works. Two were deployed live during the session.

slides.title: The *format*
slides.subtitle: No lectures. No slides. Just building.

steps.title: Pick your problem
steps.description: what wastes your time at work?

steps.title: Define it in one sentence
steps.description: who has this problem and why it hurts

steps.title: Build with Claude Code
steps.description: describe what you want, iterate fast

steps.title: Demo it live
steps.description: 3 minutes, show it working, tell the story

slides.title: You don't need to *code*
slides.subtitle: You need to describe. Claude Code turns plain English into working software.
slides.code:
# This is all it takes
claude

# Then just talk to it
"Build me a tool that takes a client meeting summary
and generates a follow-up email in our tone of voice.
Include next steps and a subject line."

left.title: Traditional workshop
items: Nobody uses it after the event

right.title: This workshop
items: Every pod picks their own real problem
Take-home: a working app that solves your problem
Two apps deployed live before leaving

slides.quote:
Come with a problem.
Leave with something
*that works.*
slides.attribution: StellarPH x KMC - Claude AI Workshop - Cebu, April 10, 2026
